channel.title: Daily AI Digest
channel.description: Curated AI/ML signals — zero LLMs, pure algorithmic curation

item.title: The TTS-STT Flywheel: Synthetic Entity-Dense Audio Closes the Indic ASR Gap Where Commercial and Open-Source Systems Fail

item.title: TCDA: Thread-Constrained Discourse-Aware Modeling for Conversational Sentiment Quadruple Analysis

item.title: OpenSeeker-v2: Pushing the Limits of Search Agents with Informative and High-Difficulty Trajectories
item.description: 🔥 Trending on HN (622 pts) — Deep search capabilities have become an indispensable competency for frontier Large Language Model (LLM) agents, yet their development remains dominated by industrial giants. The typical industry recipe involves a highly resource-intensive pipeline spanning pre-training, continual pre-training (C...

item.title: SymptomAI: Towards a Conversational AI Agent for Everyday Symptom Assessment
item.description: 📄 New in cs.AI — Language models excel at diagnostic assessments on currated medical case-studies and vignettes, performing on par with, or better than, clinical professionals. However, existing studies focus on complex scenarios with rich context making it difficult to draw conclusions about how these systems pe...

item.title: A Benchmark for Interactive World Models with a Unified Action Generation Framework
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV, cs.AI — Achieving Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) requires agents that learn and interact adaptively, with interactive world models providing scalable environments for perception, reasoning, and action. Yet current research still lacks large-scale datasets and unified benchmarks to evaluate their p...

item.title: A Closed-Form Adaptive-Landmark Kernel for Certified Point-Cloud and Graph Classification
item.description: 📄 New in cs.LG — We introduce PALACE (Persistence Adaptive-Landmark Analytic Classification Engine), the data-adaptive companion to PLACE, paying a small cross-validation tier on three knobs (budget, radii, bandwidth; $\leq 5$ choices each). A cover-theoretic core (Lebesgue-number criterion on the landmark cover)...

item.title: Audio-Visual Intelligence in Large Foundation Models
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV — Audio-Visual Intelligence (AVI) has emerged as a central frontier in artificial intelligence, bridging auditory and visual modalities to enable machines that can perceive, generate, and interact in the multimodal real world. In the era of large foundation models, joint modeling of audio and visio...

item.title: UniCorrn: Unified Correspondence Transformer Across 2D and 3D
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV — Visual correspondence across image-to-image (2D-2D), image-to-point cloud (2D-3D), and point cloud-to-point cloud (3D-3D) geometric matching forms the foundation for numerous 3D vision tasks. Despite sharing a similar problem structure, current methods use task-specific designs with separate mode...

item.title: Large Language Models are Universal Reasoners for Visual Generation
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV — Text-to-image generation has advanced rapidly with diffusion models, progressing from CLIP and T5 conditioning to unified systems where a single LLM backbone handles both visual understanding and generation. Despite the architectural unification, these systems frequently fail to faithfully align ...

item.title: LearningCircuit / local-deep-research
item.description: 💬 Active HN discussion (34 comments) · ⭐ 197 GitHub stars today — ~95% on SimpleQA (e.g. Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090). Supports all local and cloud LLMs (llama.cpp, Ollama, Google, ...). 10+ search engines - arXiv, PubMed, your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

item.title: cocoindex-io / cocoindex
item.description: ⭐ 438 GitHub stars today — Incremental engine for long horizon agents 🌟 Star if you like it!

item.title: The Algorithm That Decides How Fast Your Model Learns
item.description: 🆕 New article — <div class="medium-feed-item"><p class="medium-feed-image"><a href="https://medium.com/@ameya55n/the-algorithm-that-decides-how-fast-your-model-learns-c06f2bd12118?source=rss------llm-5"><img src="https://cdn-images-1.medium.com/max/1408/1*O0T9helpSkqe_4mgfDky0Q.png" width="1408" /></a></p><p cla...

item.title: Arindam200 / awesome-ai-apps
item.description: ⭐ 211 GitHub stars today · ⭐ 11.7k total stars — A collection of projects showcasing RAG, agents, workflows, and other AI use cases

item.title: bytedance / deer-flow
item.description: ⭐ 328 GitHub stars today · ⭐ 65.3k total stars — An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.
